scripts.test: cross-env DEBUG=off TEST_ENV=local npx playwright test
scripts.test:local: cross-env DEBUG=off TEST_ENV=local npx playwright test --project=local
scripts.test:dev: cross-env DEBUG=off TEST_ENV=dev npx playwright test --project=dev
scripts.test:test: cross-env DEBUG=off TEST_ENV=test npx playwright test --project=test
scripts.test:staging: cross-env DEBUG=off TEST_ENV=staging npx playwright test --project=staging
